response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience in C++ on Windows or capital markets/fixed income domains. Their expertise in other languages and platforms may not fully align with the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with a focus on testability and modern software practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Strong communication skills and experience sharing knowledge through workshops and talks.
Diverse technical background with exposure to high-performance systems and real-time data processing.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, especially on Windows (core requirement for the role).
No explicit mention of SQL Server or Oracle, which are mandatory skills.
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domains.
